title: Battery passport requirement for LMT and industrial batteries
summary: LMT and industrial batteries must have digital passport accessible via QR code and data matrix
action_required: Implement battery passport system with QR code and data matrix containing battery information

scope.conditions: Applies to LMT and industrial batteries only, not portable consumer batteries

title: PFAS/PFHxA restriction in textiles and coatings
summary: Perfluorohexanoic acid (PFHxA) and related substances restricted in textile coatings
action_required: Remove PFAS/PFHxA from textile coatings and replace with alternative materials

scope.conditions: Applies to products with textile components using PFAS coatings

title: Mercury restriction in lighting and displays
summary: Mercury prohibited in LED lighting and display backlights (CCFL exemption expired)
action_required: Replace mercury-containing CCFL backlights with LED alternatives

scope.conditions: CCFL exemption expired; applies to all new products placed on market

title: Button cell battery compartment security for toys
summary: Toys with button cell batteries must have child-resistant compartments
action_required: Redesign battery compartment to require tool or two independent actions to open

scope.conditions: Applies to toys intended for children under 14 with button cell batteries

title: Common charging solution for portable devices
summary: Portable electronic devices must use USB-C charging port (micro-USB prohibited)
action_required: Replace micro-USB ports with USB-C charging ports

scope.conditions: Applies to portable devices with rechargeable batteries
